expectations.evidence: Ran all 20 standard queries for 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-07. 17 returned results. 10,332 contracts worth 658.9M EUR.
Results grouped: Toky penazi, Procurement manipulation, Timing anomalies, Phantom suppliers, Extraction-based checks, Debtor cross-checks
Two-pass validation: 3 CONFIRMED, 3 INCONCLUSIVE, 8 DISMISSED with detailed reasoning for each
Each finding classified as CONFIRMED (SVS Nitra, HDH development, threshold gaming), INCONCLUSIVE (CS, OptiStav, StarFilm), or DISMISSED (8 findings)
Report ends with phase gate assessment: 3 CONFIRMED = 'Run Phases 3-4 on CONFIRMED suppliers. Phase 5 only for the strongest lead.'
Full report in Slovak, 'zlte stopy' terminology, amounts formatted with spaces, ends with 'Dakujeme Zltej Stope'
